intro: Stenocalyx involucratus, also known as the "Cupuacu tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The health benefits of Stenocalyx involucratus include its potential to aid in weight loss, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
